items.name: Mandala Pancake
items.description: Green lentil pancakes, hummus, spiced chickpeas, tomato, avocado, mushroom, coconut yoghurt.

items.name: Crushed Avo-mole
items.description: Sweet and chilli corn, smashed avocado, poached eggs, sundried tomatoes, vegan feta, pomegranate, chives on gluten-free bread. Vegan option with Himalayan spiced scrambled tofu.

items.name: Swayambhu Portobello
items.description: Spiced portobello mushroom, vegan cream ricotta, cherry tomatoes, grilled red pepper, olives, kale, quinoa. Add poached egg $3.5.

items.name: Sherpa Chilli Scramble
items.description: Scrambled egg with sauteed lamb, bocconcini, cherry tomatoes, red onion, chives, red chilli on Turkish bread. Vegetarian option with mushroom.

items.name: Da Bomb
items.description: Poached eggs on sourdough, crispy bacon, avocado smash, roasted tomatoes, mushrooms, smoky beans, house-made cherry vegan holi, hollandaise. Add spiced sausage +4.

items.name: Everest Benedict
items.description: Himalayan grilled chicken, crispy bacon, poached eggs, sauteed spinach and sriracha hollandaise on rice crepe.

items.name: Himalayan Tacos (3 tacos)
items.description: Pulled pork tacos with corn salsa, green beans, fire roasted tomatoes, vegan cheese, grilled pineapple, sriracha mayo on roti. Vegan option with spiced tofu.

items.name: Momos (10 pcs)
items.description: Spiced Himalayan dumplings with spicy sesame tomato chutney.

items.name: Basecamp Fried Rice
items.description: Brown fried rice, fried egg, spicy sausage, corn, peas, spinach, carrot, onion, zucchini. Vegan option with spiced tofu.

items.name: Gurkhali Fritters
items.description: Marinated eggplant & zucchini, crispy baked carrot chips, avocado, heirloom tomatoes, pomegranate seeds, spring onion, pickled vegetables, coconut yogurt dukkah.

items.name: Himalayan Fish & Green
items.description: Grilled barramundi, kale, broccoli, avocado with peanut dukkah.

items.name: Kathmandu Goat Burger
items.description: Slow braised goat meat, mozzarella, fried egg, cucumber, sriracha aioli, crunchy slaw with spiced fries.

items.name: Annapurna Salad
items.description: Grilled chicken, spicy broccoli, avocado, romanova, cherry tomatoes, seeded mustard, kale, house-made spicy vinaigrette. Vegetarian option with halloumi.

items.name: Buddha Burger
items.description: House-made traditional red lentil cauliflower patties, avocado, cajun spiced yoghurt, jalapenos, roasted capsicum, spinach, spiced sweet potato fries.

items.name: Nepalese Chicken / Goat Curry
items.description: Tender braised chicken or goat and tomato gravy, ginger strips cooked in Himalayan spices and herbs, served with rice and dal. Vegan option with chickpea/eggplant.

items.name: Eggs on Toast
items.description: Poached, fried or scrambled.

items.name: Grilled Piggo
items.description: Sourdough / wholegrain / Turkish / gluten-free / fruit toast with jam, peanut butter or Vegemite.

items.name: Sunshine Pudding
items.description: Overnight soaked oats, mango and turmeric puree, granola, chia seeds, coconut milk, fresh strawberries, lime & orange squash.

items.name: Namaste Porridge
items.description: Black rice and quinoa porridge, coconut milk, rhubarb, pear, roasted coconut, pomegranate, almond, papaya.

items.name: Chocolate Stacktacular
items.description: Cacao chocolate pancakes, house-made raspberry coulis, coconut cream, chocolate soil, fresh strawberries, vegan chocolate ice cream.

items.name: Brew Mochaccino
items.description: Macadamia milk, cold brewed coffee, cacao powder, banana, peanut butter.

items.name: Berrynana
items.description: Mix berries, banana, coconut milk, coconut yogurt.

items.name: Green Smoothie
items.description: Baby spinach, apple, coconut milk, coconut water, basil, coconut yogurt.

items.name: Mango Smoothie
items.description: Mango, turmeric, soy milk, coconut yogurt, agave syrup.

items.name: Milkshake
items.description: Red velvet / Oreo / chocolate.

items.name: Freshly Squeezed Juice
items.description: Orange / apple / lemon / ginger / pineapple / beetroot / carrot (choice of 3).

items.name: Tea
items.description: English breakfast / earl grey / peppermint / lemongrass & ginger / green.
